title: Rakion Chaos Force
description:
Rakion is a real time action fighting game where a single mistake can turn the tide of battle. Master powerful combos, precise guards, and summon creatures in combat to strategically dominate your opponents across multiple multiplayer modes!

 

Strategy is your greatest weapon

Every attack carries risk, and while charged strikes deal heavy damage, they also leave you exposed. Guarding, parrying, and perfectly timed grabs determine victory as reading your opponent’s movement becomes the key to survival.

 

 

Command the battlefield

Gather Cell Points to summon creatures directly into combat, overwhelm enemies with swarms, hold the line with tank types, or disrupt the fight with offensive creatures. The creature you choose can decide the outcome of the match. 

Challenge diverse modes
Engage in Team Battle, Deathmatch, Golem Mode, and cooperative stages. Reach the maximum level to unlock the Advanced Class and further strengthen your character through crafting and enchanting.

 

Rakion is free to play and delivers a combat experience where skill and strategy define the result. Grow stronger through constant competition and forge your own unique fighting style.

Features

• Real time melee combat with deep combo and guard systems

• Creature summoning through the Cell System

• Team Battle, Deathmatch, Golem Mode, and cooperative stages

• Advanced Class unlock with new weapons and skills

• Item crafting, enchanting, and dismantling system

• Free to play
description_short: Enter the arena in Rakion, an online free-to-play action RPG built for fast-paced, skill-based combat. Customize powerful warriors, unleash summoned creatures, and dominate dynamic PvP battles solo or with your team.
